/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/includes/glad/src/glad.c.o -o /Users/jethroaiyesan/Programming/Tutorials/C++/OpenGL/output/OpenGLProject  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libassimp.5.4.3.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
